response.original_title: Keyshawn Davis vs. Nahir Albright II
response.overview: Former world champion and Olympic silver medalist Keyshawn Davis faces Nahir Albright in a 12-round super lightweight showdown at the Scope Arena in Norfolk, Virginia. The two first met in October 2023, when Davis won a majority decision that was later overturned. In the 10-round welterweight co-feature, former world champion Brian Norman Jr. returns against Canada’s Josh Wagner.
response.title: Keyshawn Davis vs. Nahir Albright II
